title: Agent Assignment
description: Per-repository routing rules: maps feature ID patterns to implementation agents (.sdd/agent-assignment.json).

default_implementer.description: Fallback agent for implement-phase tasks not matched by any rule.

rules.description: Ordered list of pattern→agent overrides. First match wins.

pattern.description: Glob pattern matched against the feature ID (e.g. 'feat/frontend-*').
